core.label: VBA Fundamentals
core.description: Automate Microsoft Office with Visual Basic for Applications.

topics.label: VBA Editor (VBE)
topics.description: Open with Alt+F11. Navigate modules, immediate window, and object browser.

topics.label: Variables & Types
topics.description: Dim, Integer, Long, String, Boolean, Double, Variant, Object.

topics.label: Control Flow
topics.description: If/ElseIf/Else/End If, Select Case, For/Next, For Each, Do While/Loop.

topics.label: Sub & Function
topics.description: Sub for procedures, Function for return values. Call from macros or other code.

topics.label: Excel Object Model
topics.description: Application, Workbook, Worksheet, Range, Cells. Navigate the Excel object hierarchy.

topics.label: Range & Cells
topics.description: Range("A1:B10"), Cells(row, col), .Value, .Formula, .Select. Core Excel manipulation.

topics.label: Error Handling
topics.description: On Error GoTo, On Error Resume Next, Err object. VBA's error handling model.

topics.label: UserForms
topics.description: Build dialog boxes with UserForms — TextBox, ComboBox, CommandButton events.
